title: gymnanthemum exsertum
intro: Gymnanthemum exsertum, also known as Chinese chrysanthemum, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum exsertum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and migraines, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas and supplements. Herbal preparations of Gymnanthemum exsertum can be found in various forms, including dried flowers, extracts, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
